new_classes.definition_en: A ready-for-consumption liquid beverage based on skimmed milk or powdered skimmed milk to which refined fats (obtained from products of headings 0401 to 0404) have been added, known commercially as 'filled milk', classified under CN subheading 2202 99 95.

new_classes.label_en: Skimmed Milk or Powdered Skimmed Milk Base
new_classes.definition_en: A material entity consisting of skimmed milk or powdered skimmed milk that serves as the principal base ingredient in the production of filled milk beverages.
A material entity comprising refined fat derived from products of CN headings 0401 to 0404 (milk and dairy products), added to skimmed milk base to produce filled milk beverages.
A quality borne by a beverage indicating that it is in a state ready for direct human consumption without further preparation.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the three main distinguishing criteria from the legal text: (1) the skimmed milk or powdered skimmed milk base (via hasPart SkimmedMilkBase), (2) the presence of added fat derived from dairy products of headings 0401–0404 (via hasPart DairyDerivedFat), and (3) the ready-for-consumption nature of the beverage (via hasQuality ReadyForConsumptionQuality). The parent class SweetenedFlavouredOrAeratedWater correctly situates the code within heading 2202. A minor gap exists: the legal text references a fat content threshold range (the note appears truncated, mentioning 'by weight of fat obtained from the products of headings 0401 to 0404') — the specific percentage range (e.g. 0.2% to 2%) typical for this subheading bracket could not be captured as a numeric restriction because the note text is truncated and no exact threshold is given. Additionally, the note references sibling subheadings 22029991–22029999 collectively, and the precise fat-by-weight bracket that singles out 22029995 among those siblings is not fully specified in the truncated legal text provided.
